verdict: 2026-07-02 19:19 PDT - The sketch is sound. Adding Markdown/docs as one more Table A ecosystem row, plus a lightweight drift-linter anchor, is the minimal shape and matches the ratified Shell-row convention for this Markdown-skill meta-repo. `markdownlint` + `lychee` are appropriate recommendations, with no new dependency because `/dev-audit` is command-v-gated. Marking link checking as advisory/network-dependent is correct; keeping it out of the local gate is consistent with the prior Shell decision and avoids flaky network-dependent enforcement. No high-leverage design concerns found.
